action.reasoning: Observation: mae_60min improved to 6.4857 (from 6.5848) after 20 epochs; val MAE reached 5.416 with train loss at 0.4557, still slowly decreasing at end. Analysis: Basic GCN has limited depth/capacity and no residuals leading to potential degradation; larger hidden dim (512), more layers (6) with added skip connections will stabilize training and capture better spatiotemporal patterns; extending to 40 epochs with current scheduler allows further gains given consistent improvement and ~7min/20eps timing (fits budget). Decision: Rewrite model.py with residual GCN (hidden=512 default, 6 layers), update train.py for 40 epochs + new model init, keep predict.py unchanged; train then submit_eval for next score improvement.
